greeting.speaker: Frank
greeting.text: You're back. Sit down. I been thinking about you.

good_thoughts.speaker: Frank
good_thoughts.text: Complicated thoughts. Good and complicated aren't the same thing.

about_me.speaker: Frank
about_me.text: About what you are. What you might still be.

okay.speaker: Frank
okay.text: Two brains is a lot to manage. But I manage.

core.speaker: Frank
core.text: You ever have a thought that doesn't feel like yours?

everyone.speaker: Frank
everyone.text: No. They don't. Most people only have the one set.

what_kind.speaker: Frank
what_kind.text: Calm ones. Too calm. Like you already know what to do before you decide to do it.

more_lately.speaker: Frank
more_lately.text: That's the signal warming up. Happened to me too.

frank_hint.speaker: Frank
frank_hint.text: The man in the suit. You seen him?

choices.text: Yeah. He came in this morning.
Why does everyone keep asking about him?

harlow_yes.speaker: Frank
harlow_yes.text: Don't go back. Whatever he gave you to do, don't finish it.

harlow_no.speaker: Frank
harlow_no.text: You will. And when you do, don't look him in the eye.

harlow_everyone.speaker: Frank
harlow_everyone.text: Because the ones who notice are the ones who still have a chance.

farewell.speaker: Frank
farewell.text: Come find me tonight. I got something to tell you that I can't say out here.
